title: Not Good, Not Good
description: A recovery-threshold artifact moving from smoke, blur, bad plays, and a drying well toward gratitude, emergence, and the decision to wait and keep working.

motifMap.meaning: The pleasurable joint turns bitter, marking the edge where refuge begins to reveal its cost.
The post names a threshold toward a new season after blur, smoke, and stalled output.
The ending chooses endurance over collapse, fantasy return, or theatrical exit.

excerpt: Or wait. Keep working and hope that like the worst playwright in all of creation I might write one deed that is remembered for a moment.

associatedMedia.description: Screenshot of the published Substack post page, if available in the local screenshot archive. Screenshot capture remains optional provenance support and was not required for validation in this run.
associatedMedia.altText: A Wanderer's Burn Substack post titled 'Not Good, Not Good' by Unnamed, published May 17, 2026, reflecting on smoke, emergence, bad plays, gratitude, and continuing to work.

editHistory.notes: Self-discovered v2.6.5 batch run. Classified as Ash Moon Ascending with Vow (Endurance) because the artifact names a move toward emergence after smoke and blur, then chooses waiting, work, and gratitude.

integrity.notes: Filename: 2026-05-17.not-good-not-good.phase-ash-moon-ascending.subcurrent-vow-endurance.metadata.v2.6.5.json. Phase has no mapped v2.6.5 variant, so phase.variant is blank.
